title: The Summer We Stopped Talking
description: When sixteen-year-old Wren's older brother comes home from his first year of college changed and silent, the whole house seems to hold its breath. Over one long, sticky summer in a lake town that's seen better days, Wren has to decide whether to keep waiting for the brother she remembers, or learn to love the stranger he's become. A quiet novel about grief that nobody named.

chapters.title: Things We Don't Say at Dinner
The Long Way Around the Lake
